sections.model_description: TranslateLM-EN-FR is a Transformer-based encoder-decoder model with 12 layers, 768 hidden size, and 110M parameters, fine-tuned for English-to-French translation.
sections.intended_use: Real-time translation of English text to French for customer support chat applications.
sections.out_of_scope_use: Should not be used for legal or medical document translation where certified human translation is required.
sections.limitations: Struggles with domain-specific jargon, idiomatic expressions, and text longer than 512 tokens.
sections.bias_analysis: We evaluated the model for gender bias in pronoun translation. The model correctly translates gendered pronouns 87% of the time on the WinoMT benchmark. We have not tested for other forms of bias.
sections.training_data: Trained on a curated 50M sentence-pair corpus from Europarl, OpenSubtitles, and web-crawled data. The model architecture is a standard RNN with attention.
sections.evaluation_metrics:
BLEU score: 38.5 on WMT14 EN-FR test set.

Note: Our internal evaluation shows BLEU of 41.2 on a proprietary test set, but no confidence intervals are provided.
sections.ethical_considerations: Translation models can propagate cultural biases present in training data. Users should review translations for sensitive content.
sections.environmental_impact: Training required 200 TPU-hours. Carbon footprint not measured.
